embedding.runtime: onnxruntime (CPU/CoreML) — no cloud calls, R3 model-agnostic
embedding.notes: Embeddings are computed locally so memory never leaves the device. If dimensions change, vec_chunks in schema.sql must be recreated and the vault reindexed.

chunking.notes: Split per markdown heading/paragraph so a retrieved chunk maps cleanly back to a section of an openable note.

retrieval.notes: Retrieval is a TOOL the model calls when needed (R: L2), not an automatic pre-turn dump. Semantic search finds candidate chunks; the WHOLE note (with its [[links]]) enters context, and the answer stays traceable to that note.

reindex.notes: Incremental reindex on save; full rebuild is always possible from vault + episodic since the DB is derived, not source-of-truth.
